name: alert_facility_fields
description: Adds a required Alert facility Yes/No form field to the Medication Statement, Stop Medication, Prescribe, Adjust Prescription, and Refill commands. Persists the choice as command metadata under the key 'alert_facility' and blocks commit until a value is selected.

protocols.description: Adds the Alert facility form field to Medication Statement, Stop Medication, Prescribe, Adjust Prescription, and Refill commands in the chart UI and the note printout.
Blocks commit of Medication Statement, Stop Medication, Prescribe, Adjust Prescription, and Refill commands until the Alert facility field is set.
